reason: The statement applies because in this text fragment, it is shown that Hannah, a servant of the Lord, prayed earnestly for a child and vowed to dedicate him to the Lord if her prayer was answered. The text portrays God granting her petition and blessing her with a son, Samuel, whom she then dedicates to the service of the Lord. This demonstrates that God indeed appreciates the deeds of his servant, Hannah, and saves and protects her by answering her prayers.
